name: persona-vault
description: Turn public voices across platforms into living, verifiable knowledge vaults.

scripts.check: node --check bin/personavault.mjs && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/vault.mjs && node --check src/importers.mjs && node --check scripts/install-skills.mjs && node --check scripts/privacy-scan.mjs
scripts.validate: npm run check && npm test && npm run privacy
